subcodes.title: Baha’u’llah: Words spoken on 1911-11-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I will speak to you today of Baha'u'llah. In the third year after the Bab had declared his Mission, Baha'u'llah, being accused by fanatical Mullas
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز میخواهم قدری از مصائب جمال مبارک برای شما بیان کنم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
